suspended_children_count.description: Total number of secondary-school children who had been suspended more than once in the Portland Bayside East Housing Project.

suspended_three_or_more.description: Number of children (out of the two suspended) who had been suspended three or more times.

reported_percentage.description: The reported percentage (50%) of suspended children who had been suspended three or more times, derived from 1 out of 2 children.
